rules.condition_select: PREFIX ex: <http://example.org/ev#> SELECT ?e ?eid ?ts ?cp ?power WHERE { GRAPH <urn:window> { ?e <urn:prop:type> "ChargeRequest" ; <urn:prop:eid> ?eid ; <urn:prop:timestamp> ?ts ; <urn:prop:cp> ?cp ; <urn:prop:power> ?power . } GRAPH <urn:state> { ?cp a ex:ChargingPoint ; ex:chargingPower ?current . } }

PREFIX ex: <http://example.org/ev#> SELECT ?e ?eid ?ts ?cp ?power WHERE { GRAPH <urn:window> { ?e <urn:prop:type> "FleetSchedule" ; <urn:prop:eid> ?eid ; <urn:prop:timestamp> ?ts ; <urn:prop:cp> ?cp ; <urn:prop:power> ?power . } GRAPH <urn:state> { ?cp a ex:ChargingPoint ; ex:chargingPower ?current . } }

PREFIX ex: <http://example.org/ev#> SELECT ?e ?eid ?ts ?cp ?cap WHERE { GRAPH <urn:window> { ?e <urn:prop:type> "CapacitySignal" ; <urn:prop:eid> ?eid ; <urn:prop:timestamp> ?ts ; <urn:prop:cp> ?cp ; <urn:prop:cap> ?cap . } GRAPH <urn:state> { ?cp a ex:ChargingPoint ; ex:chargingPower ?current . } }

rules._priority_rationale: Curtailment tightens the cross-target curtailment-consistency invariant, so it is scheduled AFTER the load-reduction action q5 (priority 0) that brings charging points into compliance. Constraint-tightening actions follow the actions that satisfy the constraint.
rules.condition_select: PREFIX ex: <http://example.org/ev#> SELECT ?e ?eid ?ts ?feeder WHERE { GRAPH <urn:window> { ?e <urn:prop:type> "GridEmergency" ; <urn:prop:eid> ?eid ; <urn:prop:timestamp> ?ts ; <urn:prop:feeder> ?feeder . } GRAPH <urn:state> { ?feeder a ex:Feeder ; ex:feederState ?current . } }

PREFIX ex: <http://example.org/ev#> SELECT ?e ?eid ?ts ?cp WHERE { GRAPH <urn:window> { ?e <urn:prop:type> "GridEmergency" ; <urn:prop:eid> ?eid ; <urn:prop:timestamp> ?ts . } GRAPH <urn:state> { ?cp a ex:ChargingPoint ; ex:chargingPower ?current . } }

PREFIX ex: <http://example.org/ev#> SELECT ?e ?eid ?ts ?cp WHERE { GRAPH <urn:window> { ?e <urn:prop:type> "PlugIn" ; <urn:prop:eid> ?eid ; <urn:prop:timestamp> ?ts ; <urn:prop:cp> ?cp . } GRAPH <urn:state> { ?cp a ex:ChargingPoint ; ex:connectorState ?current . } }

PREFIX ex: <http://example.org/ev#> SELECT ?e ?eid ?ts ?cp WHERE { GRAPH <urn:window> { ?e <urn:prop:type> "DepartureSoon" ; <urn:prop:eid> ?eid ; <urn:prop:timestamp> ?ts ; <urn:prop:cp> ?cp . } GRAPH <urn:state> { ?cp a ex:ChargingPoint ; ex:chargingPower ?current . } }

PREFIX ex: <http://example.org/ev#> SELECT ?e ?eid ?ts ?cp WHERE { GRAPH <urn:window> { ?e <urn:prop:type> "FaultDetected" ; <urn:prop:eid> ?eid ; <urn:prop:timestamp> ?ts ; <urn:prop:cp> ?cp . } GRAPH <urn:state> { ?cp a ex:ChargingPoint ; ex:connectorState ?current . } }
